data.title: VSE completes Aero 3 acquisition, a global MRO service provider, from GenNx/AeroRepair IntermediateCo Inc.
data.description: VSE Corporation, a prominent aviation aftermarket distribution and repair services provider traded on NASDAQ under VSEC, has successfully completed the acquisition of GenNx/AeroRepair IntermediateCo Inc., the holding company of Aero 3, Inc. This strategic acquisition was previously announced and has now been finalized. Aero 3, a subsidiary of GenNx360 Capital Partners, is a diverse Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO) service provider with a global presence. VSE's acquisition of Aero 3 marks a significant milestone in its expansion efforts within the aviation industry.

data.title: Verde Resources Inc. files Form S-1 for public offering, applies for Nasdaq uplisting. - St. Louis, Dec 23, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Verde Resources Inc., a company trading under the ticker OTCQB: VRDR, revealed that they have submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Verde specializes in environmentally sustainable infrastructure products and technologies, establishing their position as a prominent figure in this sector. The move towards public filing signifies a significant step for the company in terms of transparency and compliance with regulations.

data.title: Chief Financial Officer Terhi Launis of Aspocomp Group Plc makes an acquisition transaction on December 23, 2025, at 2:45 p.m. Finnish time. Notification reference number: 135473/5/4.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, at 2:45 p.m. Finnish time, Aspocomp Group Plc witnessed a management transaction by Terhi Launis, the Chief Financial Officer of Aspocomp Group Oyj. The notification falls under the INITIAL NOTIFICATION category, with reference number 135473/5/4. The LEI of the issuer, Aspocomp Group Oyj, is 743700W8ZIJAMXWWWD26.

data.title: Trump Media denies $40 million Bitcoin purchase after on-chain data showed 451 BTC bought, but company claims no new purchases.
data.description: Trump Media and Technology Group (NASDAQ: DJT) clarified on Tuesday that they did not make any new Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) purchases, contrary to previous reports based on on-chain data. The company refuted claims suggesting they had acquired over $40 million worth of BTC, which implied the purchase of approximately 451 BTC valued at $40.30 million from Crypto.com through 3 transactions. This minority-owned firm of President Donald Trump responded to the situation in an email to Benzinga. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: U.S. holiday retail sales grew by 3.9% YOY, excluding automotive, from Nov 1-Dec 21, according to Mastercard SpendingPulse.
data.description: In Purchase, N.Y., recent findings from Mastercard SpendingPulse™ reveal a 3.9% year-over-year rise in U.S. retail sales, excluding automotive, during the period from November 1 to December 21. This data, representing in-store and online retail transactions across all payment methods, is not inflation-adjusted. The report highlights consumer adaptability and confidence this season, as shoppers engaged in early shopping, utilized promotions, and prioritized investing in significant experiences and desired items.

data.title: HBAR predicted at $0.1160 by Dec 26, with bearish below $0.11. Forecast sees range $0.1113-$0.1167 by year-end.
data.description: The forecast for HBAR suggests a target price of $0.1160 by December 26th, while the medium-term prediction for Hedera indicates a consolidation within the range of $0.1113 to $0.1167 until the end of the year.

data.title: Avicanna announces Paul Fornazzari's resignation from board & appoints Michael Kott, focused on cannabinoid-based products.
data.description: In Toronto on December 23, 2025, Avicanna Inc., a biopharmaceutical company (TSX: AVCN) (OTCQX: AVCNF) (FSE: 0NN) concentrating on plant-derived cannabinoid products, revealed the resignation of Mr. Paul Fornazzari from the board of directors. Additionally, they have appointed Mr. Michael Kott to join the board.

data.title: Dyne Therapeutics appoints Vikram Karnani, CEO of Collegium Pharma, to its Board of Directors.Waltham, Mass., Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts on December 23, 2025, Dyne Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DYN), a clinical-stage firm dedicated to enhancing functionality for individuals with genetically linked neuromuscular conditions, revealed the selection of Vikram Karnani to its Board of Directors. Mr. Karnani, currently the chief executive officer of Collegium Pharmaceutical, comes with substantial expertise in rare diseases and biopharmaceuticals, having led various business segments and functions at Horizon Therapeutics for almost ten years.

data.title: SL Green Realty Corp. will release Q4 2025 financial results on Jan 28, 2026, and host a conference call on Jan 29, 2026 at 2:00pm ET.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to take place on January 29, 2026, at 2:00 pm Eastern Time. This call will provide a platform for stakeholders to discuss important matters related to the company's operations and progress. Interested parties are encouraged to mark their calendars for this significant event.

data.title: North American Niobium Corp. launches radon soil-gas survey at Blanchette and Bardy projects in Quebec with RadonEx. Program started on Dec. 16, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Dec. 23, 2025, North America Niobium and Critical Minerals Corp. has begun a soil-gas survey at its Blanchette and Bardy projects in Québec. This initiative, conducted by RadonEx, an independent contractor, and specialist in geochemical services, started on December 16, 2025. The company, trading as CSE: NIOB, FSE: IOR, and OTCQB: NIOMF, is pleased to announce this development. The survey is currently in progress, with no specific end date provided.

data.title: Bausch + Lomb (NYSE/TSX: BLCO) will participate in the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: In Vaughan, Ontario, Bausch + Lomb Corporation (NYSE/TSX: BLCO), a prominent worldwide eye health company focused on enhancing vision for improved living, revealed that Chairman and CEO Brent Saunders, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Sam Eldessouky, and Chief Medical Officer and Head of Research & Development Yehia Hashad, MD, will engage in a corporate presentation at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 12, 2026.
